## What is Tidio?

Tidio is an AI-powered customer service platform combining live chat, a help desk, and chatbot automation in one workspace. Its flagship AI agent, Lyro, handles up to 67% of support inquiries automatically — resolving questions from product details to order status without requiring a human to step in.

## Who is it for?

Tidio is well suited to ecommerce stores, SaaS products, and service businesses that want to engage website visitors proactively and resolve support requests at scale without growing the support headcount. With 300,000+ businesses using the platform, it spans startups to larger teams.

## Strengths

- **Lyro AI agent** — automatically handles the majority of incoming support queries with conversational AI.
- **No-code automations (Flows)** — build lead capture, discount offers, and support sequences without writing code.
- **Generous free plan** — live chat and basic ticketing available at no cost.
- **Multi-channel** — connects email, live chat, Messenger, Instagram, and WhatsApp into one inbox.
- **Ecommerce integrations** — deep native integrations with Shopify, WooCommerce, and other platforms.

## What to consider

- Lyro AI and advanced Flows are priced as add-ons, so the effective cost climbs quickly for AI-heavy use.
- The Plus plan ($749+/mo) is a large price jump for teams needing team features.
- More oriented toward B2C and ecommerce than B2B account management.

## Bottom line

Tidio is one of the most accessible AI-powered support tools on the market — the free plan is genuinely useful, and Lyro is a practical automation for high-volume ecommerce support. If you're running a Shopify store or growing SaaS with a small team, it's worth starting here.
